name: ema_pullback_trend_indices_v1
hypothesis: On GER40 and US500 M15, a simple EMA(20)/EMA(50) trend alignment plus RSI(14) pullback to 40 (longs) or 60 (shorts) captures continuation moves. Using a single momentum filter (ADX>=18) avoids chop without over-constraining. Expected >=200 trades per combo.

entry_rules.long: ema20 > ema50 AND close > ema50 AND rsi(14) crosses up through 45 from below 45
entry_rules.short: ema20 < ema50 AND close < ema50 AND rsi(14) crosses down through 55 from above 55

regime_filter.description: Single ADX band filter; no additional confluence to avoid the zero-trade trap from prior generation.

session_filter: 07:00-21:00 UTC (cash session coverage for both indices)
